2026-04-24T22:38:20.7323278Z ##[group]Run set -eo pipefail
2026-04-24T22:38:20.7323616Z [36;1mset -eo pipefail[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:20.7323868Z [36;1mmkdir -p /tmp/gh-aw/mcp-config[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:20.7324135Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-24T22:38:20.7326889Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_DIR="/tmp/gh-aw/mcp-payloads"[0m
